playbooks.title: RAKEZ company complaint brief
filing_steps: Identify the company, file number, and free-zone connection
Attach the sealed findings summary and anchor list
Separate company-governance relief from any criminal allegation
Request the competent internal or external referral path in writing
playbooks.typical_timeline: Administrative acknowledgement varies; legal escalation timing should be confirmed with the competent authority.
playbooks.source: RAKEZ official contact and company-services channels

playbooks.title: SAPS or Hawks criminal referral brief
filing_steps: Lead with the strongest certified finding and the forum for the offence
Attach the contradiction register and anchor references
State what logs, accounts, or records still require preservation
Keep civil company remedies separate from criminal referral points
required_documents: Identity and contact details of complainant
Known dates, accounts, devices, or company identifiers
Any prior docket or reference numbers
playbooks.typical_timeline: Initial reporting is immediate; investigative timing depends on intake triage and the competent unit.
playbooks.source: SAPS and DPCI public reporting channels

playbooks.title: Lawyer handoff brief
filing_steps: Separate verified contradictions from unresolved gaps
Ask the forum-specific next question counsel must answer
playbooks.typical_timeline: Same-day preparation is possible if the record is already sealed and organized.
